title: Africa in the Age of Rapid Technological Change
summary: As part of International Relations Week at Harvard, Calestous Juma, director of the Belfer Center's Science, Technology, and Globalization Project, delivered the keynote address on Tuesday, Oct. 23, at the Center for Government and International Studies.
body: Keynote Address, International Relations Week, Harvard University As part of International Relations Week at Harvard, Calestous Juma , director of the Belfer Center's Science, Technology, and Globalization Project, delivered the keynote address on Tuesday, Oct. 23, at the Center for Government and International Studies.
